description: Classifier early-warning check results. IruMozhi base classifier (aryaman/xlm-roberta-base-irumozhi), LABEL_0=Colloquial, LABEL_1=Literary. Run on full 499-example IruMozhi dataset.
decision: Use teacher modern-colloquial as training target (96.8% — closest to human ceiling). Both colloquial modes clear the 70% gate.
